# Copilot Instructions for Blog Repository

## CRITICAL: Agent Guide — Read First

**Before responding to ANY request in this workspace, check if `AGENT_GUIDE.md` exists at the project root. If it exists, read it FIRST before taking any action.**

- Default path: `AGENT_GUIDE.md` (workspace root)
- This file contains the master operating rules for the project: content standards, writing style, category structure, and step-by-step workflows.
- All responses, file edits, and content creation must comply with the rules defined in `AGENT_GUIDE.md`.
